google.loginHint: Use your Google account to access your workspace.
google.signupHint: Create your workspace in seconds with your Google account.
google.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.

errors.popup_blocked: Popup was blocked. Allow popups for this site and try again.
errors.oauth_unavailable: Google sign-in is not available right now. Please try again later.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

login.title: Welcome to SprintifAI
login.subtitle: Continue with Google to sign in — or create your workspace if you're new. One step, no passwords.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Free for the first 14 days. No credit card required.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.success: Check your inbox for the reset link.

errors.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters.

panel.title: Meetings that ship outcomes.
panel.subtitle: Capture decisions, assign tasks, and sync execution — all in one workspace.

howItWorks.trigger: New here? See how the dashboard works
howItWorks.title: Your workspace, in 5 tools
howItWorks.intro: After you sign in, the sidebar on the left switches between these. Here's what each does and how to use it.

meeting.name: Meeting
meeting.what: HD calls that record and transcribe themselves.
meeting.how: Click Meeting → Start or join a room. When the call ends, an AI summary with decisions and action items appears automatically.

chat.name: Chat AI
chat.what: An assistant that remembers every meeting, file, and decision.
chat.how: Open Chat AI and ask in plain language — e.g. "What did we decide about the Q3 launch?" Every answer links back to its source.

calendar.name: Calendar
calendar.what: Where action items land as scheduled tasks.
calendar.how: Open Calendar to see tasks assigned from meetings. Click any event to jump back to the meeting it came from.

files.name: Files
files.what: One library for recordings, transcripts, and docs.
files.how: Open Files to browse everything auto-organized by project and date. Use the search bar to search inside videos and PDFs.

gmail.name: Gmail
gmail.what: Email with an AI summary on every thread.
gmail.how: Open Gmail to read thread summaries before opening them, and generate one-click replies in your own tone.

howItWorks.tip: Tip: press ⌘K (or Ctrl+K) anywhere in the dashboard to jump between tools instantly.
